topics.name: Example topic
topics.description: Replace this with a natural-language description of what you want to be alerted about. The classifier matches when a message looks like a clear, substantive instance of this topic. Be specific about what should and should not count: include the kind of intent, role, or context you care about, and explicitly call out near-misses you want excluded (e.g. job posts, announcements, generic mentions). The more precise the description, the fewer false positives.
